_about: Reliable vs training knowledge cutoffs per model. The FIRST-LINE lookup for #23: a brand documented only AFTER a model's reliable cutoff is in a knowledge-gap regime a priori — no ranking optimization can help it there. Use reliable_cutoff, not training_cutoff: a model's knowledge of the tail thins out well before its raw training-data date, so behavior tracks the reliable date (see the CAM X spike). Dates are YYYY-MM. Verify and extend from vendor docs.

gpt-4o-mini.source: OpenAI docs; model self-reported 'October 2023' in the probe

claude-haiku-4-5.source: Anthropic docs (distinguishes reliable ~Feb 2025 from training Jul 2025)
